title: Earnings Preview: Twist Bioscience
text: Twist Bioscience (NASDAQ: TWST) released its quarterly earnings preview ahead of their May 5, 2023 report. Analysts projected an earnings per share of -$1.12 for the quarter. The company's previous quarter saw them beat EPS estimates by $0.39, though the stock dropped 0.0% the following day. As of May 3, shares traded at $12.26, down 59.06% over the preceding 52-week period. Investors were reminded that guidance (or forecast) often matters more than earnings beats or misses when affecting stock prices. Long-term shareholders appeared bearish entering this earnings announcement given the negative yearly returns. The article emphasized that management guidance would be particularly important for investors monitoring this biotechnology company's performance.
